name: presentation-skill
description: Open-source presentation skill for Codex, ChatGPT agents, and OpenAI-style agents that build, edit, and QA polished PowerPoint PPTX presentations, slides, and slide decks.

scripts.check:python: python3 -m py_compile scripts/generate_openai_image.py scripts/asset_stage.py scripts/build_workspace.py scripts/init_deck_workspace.py scripts/preflight.py scripts/build_deck.py scripts/layout_lint.py scripts/render_slides.py scripts/render_mermaid.py scripts/design_rules_qa.py scripts/validate_planning.py scripts/verify_narration.py scripts/visual_review.py scripts/run_pptxgenjs_regression.py scripts/fetch_wikimedia_cc.py scripts/plan_research_assets.py
